content.full_text:
August 13, 1990

Mark Morodomi  
Fair Political Practices Commission  
P.O. Box 807  
Sacramento, CA 95812

Re: Conflict of Interest Analysis for Alan Mohr, Director, Mendocino County Resource Conservation District (MCRCD) and Owner/Worker, New Growth, a Forest Worker's Cooperative Corporation per Phone conversations of August 9 and 13, 1990

Dear Mr. Morodomi:

Will you please confirm in a brief letter addressed to the MCRCD, 405 Orchard Avenue, Ukiah, CA 95482 (707) 468-9223, that I am correct in understanding your analysis to be (with official letter of decision to follow) that a conflict of interest situation would exist for Alan Mohr if the MCRCD entered into a business relationship with the non-profit organization, New Growth, a Forest Worker's Cooperative Corporation (NGF) and either of these two situations were to occur:

1. If the gross annual income of NGF was less than $100,000.00 and any financial decision the MCRCD Board of Directors made would result in an increase or decrease of more than $10,000.00 in gross income.

2. If the gross annual income of NGF was greater than $100,000.00 and any financial decision the MCRCD Board of Directors made would result in an increase or decrease of more than $50,000.00 in gross income.

If either situation were to occur, Alan Mohr would have a conflict of interest and could not participate as a Board member in discussion or votes deciding the issue but could speak as a member of the public in an open meeting.

Sincerely,

Alan Mohr

P.O. Box 61, Ukiah, Ca. 95482   (707) 485-0414
